response:
Subject: Follow-up on Machine Vision Technical Discussion  

Dear Mr. Ivan Klimkovic,  

Thank you for your helpful and detailed response. I wanted to follow up regarding a potential misunderstanding concerning the current machine vision system.  

The system in question is the FLIR FL3-U3-120S3C-C, and the image sensor used is the Sony IMX172, not the e2V sensor as previously mentioned. I have attached the technical data to this email for your reference.  

Please review the FL3-U3-Technical-Reference PDF file, specifically page 18, for detailed specifications, and the FL3-U3-EMVA-Imaging PDF file, page 13, for quantum efficiency information.  

I will carefully study these files and manuals and will get back to you with further details.  

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
